Clarity.justification: The generated diagram lacks clarity as it does not include any of the components, labels, or structure present in the ground truth diagram. It only shows icons for iOS and Android, which do not convey the same information or context.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram is missing all the necessary components and information from the ground truth. It does not include any of the framework, engine, or embedder details that are present in the ground truth diagram.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram is not consistent with the ground truth in terms of structure, style, or content. It uses different icons and lacks the detailed breakdown of the Flutter system overview.
